WellnessFlow.anonymousLine: Your response is anonymous and helps us provide better care.
WellnessFlow.accessCodeSubtitle: Enter the shelter access code to setup device.
WellnessFlow.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
WellnessFlow.shortQuestionsSubtitle: to tell us more about how you feel right now
WellnessFlow.longQuestionsSubtitle: to tell us more about how you've been feeling this past week
WellnessFlow.almostDoneSubtitle: Submit your responses now, or continue with the optional questions you haven't answered yet.
WellnessFlow.longFormSubtitle: All optional — select any answers that apply. Scroll to the bottom to submit.

ShortQuestions.short-1-prompt: What would help you most today?
ShortQuestions.short-2-prompt: How has rest or sleep been for you lately?
ShortQuestions.short-3-prompt: Is there anything else you want the team to know right now?

LongQuestions.long-1-prompt: In the past week, what best describes your overall mood?
LongQuestions.long-2-prompt: What has been hardest lately? (Select any that apply.)
LongQuestions.long-3-prompt: How connected do you feel to support here?
LongQuestions.long-4-prompt: What helps you feel grounded? (Select any.)
LongQuestions.long-5-prompt: Any changes in appetite or energy this week?
LongQuestions.long-6-prompt: Anything else you want staff to know? (Select any.)
LongQuestions.long-6-opt-2: I want to be left alone today
